entity.label: Baal
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: The name of a place inhabited by the Simeonites, the same probably as Baal-ath-beer (1 Chr. 4:33; Josh. 19:8).

nodes.label: Baal
nodes.description: The name of a place inhabited by the Simeonites, the same probably as Baal-ath-beer (1 Chr. 4:33; Josh. 19:8).

verses.text: And all their villages that were round about the same cities, unto Baal. These were their habitations, and their genealogy.
